youtube_description: Take what you love to the next level with the right tech. Subscribe for new product videos, inspiration, tech tips and more.

mechanisms.name: website_ssl
mechanisms.label: Website exists & SSL
mechanisms.evidence: HTTPS active but load time is slow (> 3s)

mechanisms.name: seo_foundations
mechanisms.label: SEO Foundations
mechanisms.evidence: Meta description and canonical URL present

mechanisms.name: analytics_tracking
mechanisms.label: Analytics & Tracking
mechanisms.evidence: GA detected
mechanisms.recommendation: You cannot optimize what you do not measure. No analytics means you are flying blind on every marketing dollar.

mechanisms.name: serp_discoverability
mechanisms.label: SERP Discoverability
mechanisms.evidence: Found in top search positions (Rank: 1)

mechanisms.name: gbp_presence
mechanisms.label: Google Business Profile Presence
mechanisms.evidence: Claimed listing with basic photos and hours

mechanisms.name: social_presence
mechanisms.label: Social Platform Presence
mechanisms.evidence: 8 platform profiles found: [youtube, pinterest, google_business_profile, tiktok, twitter, facebook, instagram, linkedin]

mechanisms.name: follower_reach
mechanisms.label: Aggregate Follower Reach
mechanisms.evidence: Total reach is 1681944 followers

mechanisms.name: content_marketing
mechanisms.label: Content Marketing (Blog)
mechanisms.evidence: No blog or article section detected
mechanisms.recommendation: No active blog/articles. Content marketing compounds — every month you do not publish is a month competitors build SEO authority.

mechanisms.name: reviews_ratings
mechanisms.label: Reviews & Ratings
mechanisms.evidence: No reviews found on main profiles
mechanisms.recommendation: You have few reviews or low average ratings. Prospects will choose competitors with richer social proof.

mechanisms.name: case_studies
mechanisms.label: Case Studies & Portfolio
mechanisms.evidence: No case studies or portfolio pages detected
mechanisms.recommendation: You have no proof your services work. A prospect comparing you to a competitor with detailed case studies will choose them every time.

mechanisms.name: testimonials
mechanisms.label: Testimonials
mechanisms.evidence: No testimonials detected on website
mechanisms.recommendation: You are asking prospects to trust you based on your own claims. Client testimonials are 12x more persuasive.

mechanisms.name: content_recency
mechanisms.label: Content Recency (Cross-Platform)
mechanisms.evidence: No recent posts found or no post data extracted
mechanisms.recommendation: Your social channels have not posted recently. An inactive online presence signals an inactive business.

mechanisms.name: authority_signals
mechanisms.label: Authority Signals (Verified)
mechanisms.evidence: Verified badge or authority proof across 1-2 platforms

mechanisms.name: external_link_quality
mechanisms.label: External Link Quality
mechanisms.evidence: No link-in-bio or external links found on profiles
mechanisms.recommendation: Your social profile links are broken or point to non-hub pages. Every profile visit is a missed funnel opportunity.

mechanisms.name: linkedin_presence
mechanisms.label: LinkedIn Professional Presence
mechanisms.evidence: LinkedIn Company Page optimized: description present, website linked (http://jobs.bestbuy.com), follower count: 549000

mechanisms.name: pricing_transparency
mechanisms.label: Pricing Transparency
mechanisms.evidence: Clear pricing: multiple tiers or transparent rates defined

mechanisms.name: booking_cta
mechanisms.label: Booking / Demo / Consultation CTA
mechanisms.evidence: No booking, demo, or consultation CTA detected
mechanisms.recommendation: A prospect just decided they want to work with you, but there is no booking mechanism on your site. They will book with whoever makes it easiest.

mechanisms.name: contact_accessibility
mechanisms.label: Contact Accessibility
mechanisms.evidence: No phone, email, or contact form found
mechanisms.recommendation: It is too hard for customers to contact you. Ensure email, phone, and address are prominently displayed.

mechanisms.name: privacy_compliance
mechanisms.label: Privacy & Compliance
mechanisms.evidence: No privacy policy or cookie banner found
mechanisms.recommendation: You collect user data without a visible privacy policy. This is a GDPR/CCPA risk and immediate trust killer.

mechanisms.name: platform_decision_signals
mechanisms.label: Platform-Specific Decision Signals
mechanisms.evidence: No native platform commerce or call features active
mechanisms.recommendation: You are not utilizing platform-specific transaction features like shops or call-to-action buttons.

mechanisms.name: forms_lead_capture
mechanisms.label: Forms & Lead Capture
mechanisms.evidence: No forms detected on site
mechanisms.recommendation: No forms detected. You cannot capture lead information without a structured capture form.

mechanisms.name: ecommerce_checkout
mechanisms.label: E-Commerce Checkout
mechanisms.evidence: No e-commerce indicators detected
mechanisms.recommendation: No checkout infrastructure detected. E-Commerce brands must have a fully functional checkout stack.

mechanisms.name: mobile_optimization
mechanisms.label: Mobile Optimization
mechanisms.evidence: Responsive layout present, but mobile TTFB is slow (> 2s)

mechanisms.name: email_newsletter_capture
mechanisms.label: Email & Newsletter Capture
mechanisms.evidence: No newsletter signup or email capture detected
mechanisms.recommendation: No email or newsletter capture. Build your mailing list to capture leads before they leave.

mechanisms.name: chat_realtime
mechanisms.label: Chat & Real-Time Engagement
mechanisms.evidence: No chat widget detected
mechanisms.recommendation: No chat widget detected. Instant messaging options raise conversion rates by answering questions in real-time.

mechanisms.name: content_consistency
mechanisms.label: Content Consistency
mechanisms.evidence: No posting frequency data extracted
mechanisms.recommendation: You post infrequently. Retention and community growth depend on a steady content calendar.

mechanisms.name: cross_platform_connectivity
mechanisms.label: Cross-Platform Connectivity
mechanisms.evidence: No cross-platform linking detected
mechanisms.recommendation: Your social profiles and website do not link to each other. Users cannot follow you across the web.

mechanisms.name: community_presence
mechanisms.label: Community Presence
mechanisms.evidence: No community channels detected
mechanisms.recommendation: No community channels detected. Build customer stickiness by hosting interactive communities.

mechanisms.name: gbp_review_engagement
mechanisms.label: GBP Review Engagement
mechanisms.evidence: No reviews found on Google listing
mechanisms.recommendation: Reviews exist but you respond to few or none. Responding build client retention and search ranking authority.

mechanisms.name: content_organization
mechanisms.label: Content Organization
mechanisms.evidence: No content organization detected
mechanisms.recommendation: Your social content is disorganized. Curation helps direct viewers through the marketing funnel.
